title: Howmet (HWM) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Howmet (HWM) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Howmet Aerospace Board Approves Common and Preferred Stock Dividends
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) declared (a) a dividend of 4 cents per share on the outstanding Common Stock of the Company, to be paid on August 25, 2023, to the holders of record of the Common Stock at the close of business on August 4, 2023; and (b) a dividend of 93.75 cents per share on the outstanding $3.75 Cumulative Preferred Stock (“Class A Stock”) of the Company, to be paid on October 1, 2023 to the holders of record of the Class A Sto.

title: Howmet Aerospace to Host Webcast and Announce Second Quarter 2023 Results
